title: ABot-M0.5: Unified Mobility-and-Manipulation World Action Model
innovation_summary: ABot-M05: Unified Mobility-and-Manipulation World Action Model: To align inference conditions, we propose the dream-forcing training strategy that progressively trains inverse dynamics on model-predicted videos, improving train-test alignment and robustness during autoregressive prediction.
